scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: npx kill-port 5000 5173 && concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: npx kill-port 5000 && cd backend && npm run dev
scripts.dev:frontend: npx kill-port 5173 && cd frontend && npm run dev
